case_title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. ROBERT ALLEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $119.83/DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 74951192) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC.
